title: Cancellation and rebooking appointments
content:
## Cancellation

1. Verify patient identity.
2. Locate booking in PAS ledger by reference or patient ID.
3. Cancel atomically; slot returns to availability pool.
4. Notify patient with confirmation reference.

## Rebooking

1. Cancel existing booking (or atomic rebook if tool available).
2. Re-run availability search with updated preferences.
3. Priority may be re-assessed if symptoms changed.
4. Calendar conflict check on patient's side before confirming.

Late cancellations (< 24h) may trigger waitlist backfill for the freed slot.
